Class CardValueCalculator

java.lang.Object
com.example.elcincuentazo.model.CardValueCalculator
public final class CardValueCalculator extends Object
Utility class that encapsulates the card-value rules for Cincuentazo.

Rules applied to a card's face value:

  • 2–8, 10 → add the face value to the table sum.
  • 9 → neither adds nor subtracts (contributes 0).
  • J (11), Q (12), K (13) → subtract 10 from the table sum.
  • A (1) → add either 1 or 10, whichever does not cause the table sum to exceed 50; if both exceed 50, treat as +1 (the lesser evil kept for elimination checking).

This class is stateless and cannot be instantiated.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static int
    aceOptimalDelta(int currentSum)
    Calculates the best possible delta for an Ace explicitly, returning either 1 or 10.
    static int
    calculateDelta(Card card, int currentSum)
    Calculates the point contribution of a card given the current table sum.
    static String
    describeEffect(Card card, int currentSum)
    Returns a human-readable description of how a card affects the table sum, useful for logging and GUI tooltips.
    static boolean
    isPlayable(Card card, int currentSum)
    Determines whether playing a given card would keep the table sum at or below 50 (i.e. the play is valid).

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • calculateDelta

      public static int calculateDelta(Card card, int currentSum)
      Calculates the point contribution of a card given the current table sum.

      For an Ace, this method picks the value (1 or 10) that keeps the table sum at or below 50. If both options exceed 50, it returns 1 so the caller can detect the elimination condition.

      Parameters:
      card - the card being evaluated; must not be null
      currentSum - the current accumulated sum on the table (mesa)
      Returns:
      the delta to apply to currentSum (can be negative for J/Q/K, zero for 9, positive otherwise)

    • aceOptimalDelta

      public static int aceOptimalDelta(int currentSum)
      Calculates the best possible delta for an Ace explicitly, returning either 1 or 10.
      Parameters:
      currentSum - the current table sum
      Returns:
      10 if it does not exceed 50; 1 otherwise

    • isPlayable

      public static boolean isPlayable(Card card, int currentSum)
      Determines whether playing a given card would keep the table sum at or below 50 (i.e. the play is valid).
      Parameters:
      card - the card to evaluate
      currentSum - the current table sum
      Returns:
      true if the card may legally be played

    • describeEffect

      public static String describeEffect(Card card, int currentSum)
      Returns a human-readable description of how a card affects the table sum, useful for logging and GUI tooltips.
      Parameters:
      card - the card in question
      currentSum - the current table sum before the card is played
      Returns:
      description string, e.g. "K de Picas resta 10"
